items.summary: In `frontend/src/components/landing/SwipeCarouselSection.tsx`, slightly reduce the vertical spacing between the carousel image block and the carousel text block, while keeping the existing mobile-first vertical flow (image on top, text below) and keeping all carousel copy unchanged.

In `frontend/src/components/landing/SwipeCarouselSection.tsx`, slightly reduce line spacing (leading) within the carousel text block (title/description/bullets/tagline) so the text reads tighter, while preserving readability and keeping all carousel copy unchanged.

Add an animated arrow indicator on the right side of the carousel area in `frontend/src/components/landing/SwipeCarouselSection.tsx` to hint users can swipe/scroll to the next slide; the indicator must be visually subtle, consistent with the black + gold theme, and must not overlap slide content or the existing navigation controls.
